task_prompt: Run analysis.Rmd file in the analysis data_and_code/code/folder
tasks: Based on Model 1 (the no-decoy target similarity model), what is the estimated regression coefficient for the solo condition relative to the no-bot reference group? Return only the number rounded to two decimal places.

From the bot answer analysis model, what is the posterior mean of the interaction coefficient between the least-similar bot condition and the no-decoy landscape? Return only the number rounded to two decimal places.
What is the estimated coefficient for βSolo in the semantic alignment model where the no-bot condition is the reference? Return only the number rounded to two decimal places.
In the semantic alignment model, what is the reference category for the bot condition variable? Choose one from Most, Least, Random, Solo, and No Bot and report it.
